gettingStarted.title: Let's build your CV
gettingStarted.subtitle: Start by entering your basic information. You can always edit this later.
gettingStarted.tip: Tip: A strong headline helps recruiters understand your expertise at a glance.

workExperience.title: Your work experience
workExperience.subtitle: Add your relevant work history, starting with your most recent position.
workExperience.tip: Tip: Focus on achievements and impact, not just responsibilities.

education.title: Your education
education.subtitle: Add your educational background and any relevant certifications.
education.tip: Tip: Include relevant coursework or honors if you're early in your career.

skillsProjects.title: Skills & Projects
skillsProjects.subtitle: Highlight your key skills and showcase your best projects.
skillsProjects.tip: Tip: Include both technical and soft skills relevant to your target role.

review.title: Review your CV
review.subtitle: Take a final look at your CV before downloading.
review.downloadReady: Your CV is ready to download!
